have: Pravilnik o projektiranju cest (unofficial consolidated text / NPB), 42pp. Original Ur. l. RS 91/2005, amended Ur. l. RS 26/2006. Framework regulation issued under Zakon o cestah.
authoritative_set: Pravilnik o projektiranju cest (Ur. l. RS 91/05, sprem. 26/06) — free — https://pisrs.si/Pis.web/pregledPredpisa?id=PRAV5811

TSC 03.200 : 2003 — Temeljni pogoji za določanje cestnih elementov (vozno-dinamični pogoji, preglednost / pregledne razdalje, prečni nagibi) — free — https://www.gov.si/zbirke/storitve/tehnicne-specifikacije-za-javne-ceste/ (DRSI catalog)

TSC 03.300 : 2002 — Geometrijski elementi osi ceste in vozišča (horizontalni/vertikalni elementi, prečni profili) — free — https://www.gov.si/zbirke/storitve/tehnicne-specifikacije-za-javne-ceste/ (DRSI catalog)

TSPI-PCPV-PGV.03.245 : 2023 — Krožna križišča s spiralnim potekom (newer DRSI guideline series superseding/extending TSC) — free — https://www.gov.si/assets/organi-v-sestavi/DRSI/Dokumenti-DRSI/Tehnicne-specifikacije/TSPI-PCPV-PGV.03.245-Krozna-krizisca-s-spiralnim.pdf

missing.doc: TSC 03.300 : 2002 — Geometrijski elementi osi ceste in vozišča
missing.why_essential: Carries the detailed tabulated geometric VALUES: minimum horizontal radii vs design speed, transition-curve (klotoida) parameters A/L, vertical (convex/concave) curve radii, lane and carriageway widths, cross-section composition. The Pravilnik gives the framework + some values but the design-element tables live here.

missing.doc: TSC 03.200 : 2003 — Temeljni pogoji za določanje cestnih elementov (preglednost / pregledne razdalje, prečni nagib)
missing.why_essential: Defines stopping/overtaking sight distance, sight-distance types and obstruction limits, and cross-slope (superelevation) basis used to size horizontal curves. Note: issued as 'Predlog' (proposal) and not formally confirmed via Odredba — used as de-facto reference; this affects its binding status.

missing.doc: TSC 03.341 : 2011 — Krožna križišča (and TSPI-PCPV-PGV.03.245:2023 — krožna križišča s spiralnim potekom)
missing.why_essential: Geometric design of at-grade roundabouts (radii, lane widths, deflection, sight) — not covered numerically in the Pravilnik.

notes: The Pravilnik o projektiranju cest (Ur. l. RS 91/05, amended only by Ur. l. RS 26/06 which extended a transitional deadline) is CURRENT and substantive: it does contain numeric geometric content (design-speed tables, min horizontal radii, transition-curve params, sight-distance and vertical-curve tables, lane/shoulder widths, cross-slopes in arts. ~16-45). However it is structured as the binding FRAMEWORK and explicitly delegates detail to the TSC series; the authoritative detailed geometric VALUES live in the TSC 03.x (trasa/geometric elements/cross sections/sight) plus TSC/TSPI 03.34x (roundabouts). Hence PARTIAL: the Pravilnik alone gives usable headline values but the full design-element tables and at-grade-junction/roundabout geometry require the TSCs. Slovenia is migrating TSC -> new 'TSPI' (Projektiranje cest in prometna varnost) guideline series (DRSI/Ministrstvo za infrastrukturo, 2023-2026); most geometry TSCs (03.200/03.300) remain the operative reference pending TSPI equivalents. Interchanges/weaving (motorway free-flow junctions) are NOT covered by Pravilnik+TSC 03.x at value level — DARS (motorway operator) internal/Pravilnik motorway provisions govern; flagged as a gap. All TSC/TSPI and the Pravilnik are FREELY downloadable from official sources (gov.si DRSI portal, pisrs.si); no paid standards body. WARNING: TSC 03.200/03.300 full-text PDFs surfaced mainly on non-official mirrors (gradbenik.wordpress.com, fpp.uni-lj.si, scribd); the authoritative copies are in the DRSI 'Tehnične specifikacije za javne ceste' catalog on gov.si — fetch only from there.
recommended_actions: Acquire TSC 03.300:2002 (geometrijski elementi osi ceste in vozišča) and TSC 03.200:2003 (temeljni pogoji / pregledne razdalje, prečni nagibi) from the official DRSI catalog on gov.si — these carry the geometric value tables the Pravilnik delegates.
Acquire TSC 03.341:2011 (krožna križišča) and the newer TSPI-PCPV-PGV.03.245:2023 (spiralna krožna križišča) for at-grade roundabout geometry.

Confirm formal status of TSC 03.200 (marked 'Predlog'/proposal in EU TRIS notification) and check the Odredba o seznamu potrjenih tehničnih specifikacij za javne ceste (pisrs.si ODRE2143) for the official list of confirmed/binding TSCs.
Monitor the DRSI 'TSPI' rollout (gov.si) for a geometry/trasa TSPI that may supersede TSC 03.200/03.300.
For motorway interchange/weaving geometry, check DARS technical requirements and Pravilnik provisions for avtoceste/hitre ceste — not covered numerically by the TSC 03.x set.
Treat gov.si (DRSI) and pisrs.si / uradni-list.si as the ONLY authoritative sources; do not rely on the wordpress/scribd mirrors for final values.
